text.title: Vision Applications — Task + Provider + Review Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: What is the task_type in the request?

branch.question: Is the document high-stakes (financial / legal / medical / regulated)?

branch.conclusion: Provider = OpenAI GPT-4o with detail=high. response_format json_object + schema-in-prompt + retry-on-parse. Always set needs_human_review for amounts above threshold.
Provider = OpenAI GPT-4o with detail=auto. json_object + schema-in-prompt. Standard retry budget.

branch.question: Is this part of a batch (> 100 images / minute)?

branch.conclusion: Provider = Gemini Flash. detail=auto (low effective). asyncio.gather under semaphore=15. Cache aggressively.
Provider = OpenAI GPT-4o haiku-equivalent. detail=auto. Normalize category to lowercase before persisting.
Provider = OpenAI GPT-4o (best at policy reasoning) OR Claude Sonnet (alternative). Apply severity normalization + needs_human_review threshold rule. Never auto-action on confidence < 0.7.

example.p: Input: task_type=document, high_stakes=true (financial). → conclusion r2-detail-auto-default: OpenAI GPT-4o with detail=high, json_object, schema-in-prompt; amounts above threshold → needs_human_review=true.
